rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The codebase already has a SlidingWindowRateLimiter with in-memory Map, byIp key resolver, and createRateLimiterMiddleware factory—duplicate implementations should be avoided.","scope":"src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Middleware follows a factory pattern: a limiter class (SlidingWindowRateLimiter) paired with a createXxxMiddleware factory function.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Medium-complexity tasks classified as 'chore' + 'low' risk are often already implemented; check existing code before creating new files.","scope":"taskify classification"}]}
